bead.title: ddx home: route server and graphql state paths through ddxroot
bead.description:
PROBLEM
The server and GraphQL layers still create stores, workers, comparisons, and artifact paths by joining literal `.ddx` segments, so multi-project server flows cannot honor convention-mode roots.

ROOT CAUSE
Representative direct joins remain in `cli/internal/server/server.go:796`, `cli/internal/server/workers.go:714`, `cli/internal/server/state_graphql.go:281`, `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_feat008.go:299`, `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_beads.go:233`, `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_runs.go:124`, `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_artifacts.go:578`, `cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_graph_repair.go:272`, and `cli/internal/docgraph/docgraph.go:1196`.

PROPOSED FIX
- Add package-local DDx-root helpers for `internal/server` and `internal/server/graphql` so store/path construction routes through `ddxroot.Path`.
- Replace remaining literal `.ddx` joins in the server, GraphQL, and adjacent document/artifact helpers touched by the audit.
- Add focused tests proving server-side worker/store and GraphQL resolver paths resolve through the configured DDx root in convention mode.

NON-SCOPE
- CLI/config/git and runtime/agent/exec packages.
- Test-only files and the final full-tree hook gate.

DEPS
- No deps.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestWorkerManagerUsesDDxRoot` proves server worker/store paths resolve through `ddxroot.Path` for a convention-root project.
2. `TestGraphQLResolversUseDDxRoot` proves GraphQL bead/run/artifact resolvers resolve project state through `ddxroot.Path`.
3. `rg 'filepath\.Join\([^)]*"\.ddx"' cli/internal/server cli/internal/server/graphql cli/internal/docgraph --type go | grep -v '^cli/internal/ddxroot/'` returns zero hits.
4. `cd cli && go test ./internal/server/... ./internal/docgraph/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
